title: Transformer Runtime Configuration
description: Schema for the runtime configuration of the Eightfold Multi-Source Candidate Data Transformer. Controls which fields to output, normalization rules, and error handling behavior.

fields.description: List of field selectors that control which canonical fields appear in the output and how they are mapped or transformed.

path.description: Dot-notation path to the output field (e.g., 'full_name', 'emails', 'skills[].name'). Supports array indexing with [N] and array iteration with [].

from.description: Optional source path in the canonical schema to pull the value from, if different from 'path'. Use when renaming or extracting nested fields (e.g., 'emails[0]' to produce a single 'primary_email').

type.description: Expected output type for the field. Used for validation and casting.

required.description: If true, the transformer will enforce that this field is present and non-null in the output. Behavior when missing is controlled by 'on_missing'.

normalize.description: Optional normalization strategy to apply to this field's value.

include_confidence.description: If true, include per-skill confidence scores and the overall_confidence field in the output. If false, strip all confidence metadata.

on_missing.description: Strategy for handling fields that are requested but have no value in the merged profile.
